scripts.comment:2: BASE TEST COMMANDS — What to run
scripts.comment:8: COMBINED REPORT COMMANDS — Clean → Test → Report
scripts.report:all: npm run clean:allure && npm run test:all && npm run report:generate && npm run report:open
scripts.report:api: npm run clean:allure && npm run test:api && npm run report:generate && npm run report:open
scripts.report:smoke: npm run clean:allure && npm run test:smoke && npm run report:generate && npm run report:open
scripts.report:regression: npm run clean:allure && npm run test:regression && npm run report:generate && npm run report:open
scripts.report:api:smoke: npm run clean:allure && npm run test:api:smoke && npm run report:generate && npm run report:open
scripts.report:api:regression: npm run clean:allure && npm run test:api:regression && npm run report:generate && npm run report:open
scripts.test: npx playwright test && npx playwright show-report
